title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Apollo Telehealth Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Apollo Telehealth Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Apollo Telehealth Capital India family as a Backend Developer in Raipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Apollo Telehealth Capital India:
Apollo Telehealth Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Telehealth Capital India!
